title: cryptantha torreyana subvar. calycosa
intro: Cryptantha torreyana subvar. calycosa, also known as California cryptantha, is a perennial plant species belonging to the borage family (Boraginaceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant's health benefits are associated with its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. The herbal preparations of Cryptantha torreyana subvar. calycosa typically involve making teas or infusions from the plant's leaves and flowers, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential uses and effects.
